message:
Add SporkHarnessReport schema with config summary and attachment refs (bd-11dm5)

Introduce a stable, JSON-first report schema for Spork app harness runs
that wraps LabRunReport with structured config snapshots and artifact
attachment references:

- LabConfigSummary: JSON-friendly snapshot of LabConfig (seed, workers,
  budgets, chaos, replay, futurelock settings) decoupled from internal types
- ChaosConfigSummary: Stable snapshot of chaos injection probabilities
- HarnessAttachmentKind enum (CrashPack/ReplayTrace/Trace/Other) with
  Display impl and deterministic Ord for stable JSON output ordering
- HarnessAttachmentRef: path-only artifact reference with convenience
  constructors (crashpack/replay_trace/trace) and to_json()
- SporkHarnessReport: wraps LabRunReport + config + attachments with
  schema_version=1, stable fingerprint extraction points, and to_json()
  that sorts attachments by (kind, path) for deterministic output
- LabRuntime::run_until_quiescent_spork_report() and spork_report()
  convenience methods for harness integration
- Re-export new types from lab/mod.rs
- Integration test verifying schema determinism: attachment insertion
  order does not affect JSON output, stable field locations verified

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
